summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Milk and Raw Material Gain/Loss Adjustment features. Backend: 19/19 tests passed. Frontend: All UI tests passed. Both Milk TS Sheet and Raw Material Stock pages have working gain/loss adjustment functionality. Fixed missing RM adjustment DELETE endpoint.

issues: Console warning: <span> cannot be a child of <option> - minor React hydration warning in select dropdown

passed_tests: Milk Adjustment API: POST /api/milk-adjustment with type='gain' creates gain entry
Milk Adjustment API: POST /api/milk-adjustment with type='loss' creates loss entry
Milk Adjustment API: GET /api/milk-adjustment returns list sorted by date desc
Milk Adjustment API: PUT /api/milk-adjustment/{id} updates entry
Milk Adjustment API: DELETE /api/milk-adjustment/{id} admin only (RBAC verified)
Milk Adjustment API: View-only user cannot create (403)
Milk Adjustment API: Modify user can create
Milk TS Report: GET /api/reports/milk-ts includes total_gain and total_loss
Milk TS Report: daily_summary includes gain_milk_kg, gain_fat_kg, gain_snf_kg, loss_milk_kg, loss_fat_kg, loss_snf_kg
Milk TS Report: Closing = Opening + Purchased - Used + Gain - Loss (verified)
RM Adjustment API: POST /api/rm-adjustment with material_name, type, quantity
RM Adjustment API: GET /api/rm-adjustment returns list
RM Adjustment API: PUT /api/rm-adjustment/{id} updates entry
RM Adjustment API: DELETE /api/rm-adjustment/{id} admin only (RBAC verified)
RM Ledger: GET /api/reports/raw-material-ledger includes total_adjustment
RM Ledger: Transactions include adj_qty field
RM Ledger: closing_stock = opening + total_in - total_out + total_adjustment (verified)
UI Milk TS: Gain/Loss button opens modal with gain/loss toggle
UI Milk TS: Summary cards show 6 cards including Gain (green) and Loss (orange)
UI Milk TS: Daily table has Gain and Loss column groups
UI Milk TS: Adjustments tab shows entries with type badge (GAIN/LOSS)
UI Milk TS: Edit/Delete buttons visible for admin
UI RM Stock: Gain/Loss button opens modal with material select and gain/loss toggle
UI RM Stock: Ledger summary row shows Adjustment when non-zero
UI RM Stock: Expanded ledger table has Adj column and shows adjustment transactions
critical_code_review_comments: Minor React warning in RM adjustment modal select dropdown (span inside option) - cosmetic only
seed_data_creation: Created test adjustments during testing (cleaned up TEST_ prefixed entries)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gain/Loss adjustment features fully tested. Milk adjustments: CRUD working with RBAC. RM adjustments: CRUD working with RBAC (DELETE endpoint added). Key endpoints: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/milk-adjustment, POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/rm-adjustment, GET /api/reports/milk-ts (includes total_gain/total_loss), GET /api/reports/raw-material-ledger (includes total_adjustment). Frontend routes: /milk-total-solid, /raw-material-stock. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_adjustment_features.py. Closing stock formulas verified: Milk: Closing = Opening + Purchased - Used + Gain - Loss. RM: Closing = Opening + In - Out + Adjustment.
